output.code:
with open('/mnt/data/file-KQt8CLNjwDd2bnDeHWqqhC-text_to_analyse.txt','r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
text[:2000]

quote1_start = text.find('"And if they had only been patient')
quote1_start

span1 = text[quote1_start+1:quote1_end]  # exclude starting quote
span1[:200]

start1 = quote1_start + 1
end1 = quote1_end
assert text[start1:end1] == span1

quote2_start = text.find('"And [mention] when We made the Children of Israel dwell')
quote2_start

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":416,"span_end":1079,"span_text":"And if they had only been patient and been mindful of the meeting with their Lord, they would have been better. And indeed, the dwellers of the Garden will be in security, and they will be in peace. But the dwellers of the Fire will be in distress, and they will be in a state of punishment. And they will say, 'Would that we had been with the people of the Book, and had not been with the people of the Fire!' But they will say, 'Indeed, we were wronged, and we were killed in the way of Allah.' And indeed, the dwellers of the Fire will be in the punishment of their Lord, and they will be in a state of disgrace. And they will be given a torment that is great.","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1362,"span_end":4317,"span_text":"And [mention] when We made the Children of Israel dwell in a secure place, and We gave them the Book and the wisdom and the prophets.
